name: TORCHBEARER
description:
MIDWEST INDIGO
𖣂 | Concentrate on the little gap in the ice


As winter rapidly approaches, the Banditos work tirelessly to prepare for the harsh conditions, building sturdy cabins to replace their vulnerable tents. Torchbearer, their quiet yet steadfast leader, oversees the efforts, guiding the group with silent determination. The camp bustles with activity as they gather supplies and fortify their shelters, knowing the coming cold will test their resilience. Though thoughts of Clancy, still trapped in Dema, weigh heavily on Torchbearer’s mind, he remains focused on strengthening the Banditos, their resolve, and their light.

ANY POV / LIMITLESS
